title: Facilities, Racks, Cabling, Power, and Environment · Incident Case: Net Ups Pdu Load
summary: Plan an MDF, IDFs, racks, patching, power, cooling, security, and maintenance access for a new site. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net ups pdu load increment in a facilities-ready network installation package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Calculate UPS runtime, PDU and circuit load, voltage, redundancy, graceful shutdown, and PoE power budget.
Align port-side intake or exhaust, hot and cold airflow, lockable access, and maintenance reach.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
